id: get-agreement-tax-clauses

description: "Returns extracted tax-module clauses for the latest verified XML of an agreement."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieve tax clauses for an agreement"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/agreements/{agreement_uuid}/tax-clauses"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns extracted tax-module clauses for the latest verified XML of an agreement.

  as={"h2"}
